RemediationStrings.Title: DisableExceptionChainValidation (Administrative Templates - MS Security Guide)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\kernel\DisableExceptionChainValidation must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - MS Security Guide.

RemediationStrings.Title: SMB1 (Administrative Templates - MS Security Guide)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\LanmanServer\Parameters\SMB1 must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - MS Security Guide.

RemediationStrings.Title: Start (Administrative Templates - MS Security Guide)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\MrxSmb10\Start must be 4. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - MS Security Guide.

RemediationStrings.Title: ProtectionMode (Administrative Templates - MS Security Guide)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\ProtectionMode must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - MS Security Guide.
